inscription.head:
No. 2.
(A.R. No. 2 of 1900).
ON A ROCK IN THE FORT AT THE SAME VILLAGE. Below the inscription is a damaged sculptural representation of a warrior on horse-back
another on foot. Close to the latter are four attendants, of whom one holds an umbrella over his head. The
remaining three appear to carry some weapons.

ON A SLABAt the top are cut

vikku makkaḷāki nikaḻac centamiḻ vaṭakalai terintuṇarntu niti keṭṭu nipuṇarāki
naṟumalar vāṭāta ti-

(ta)meḻiye teyvamā[ka]vuñ ce[m]poṟp pacum-
paiye veliyākavum kṣamaiyiṉoṭug karuṇai yeytic camaiyataṉma miṉitu naṭātti

ṟa uttamaniti yuyarperug kirtti muttamiḻmālai muḻuvatu muṇarnta cittarameḻip-
periyan[ā]ṭṭom vaittukkuṭutta paricāvatu milāṭākiya jaṉaṉātavaḷanāṭṭuk
kuṟukkai-

kkū[ṟ*]ṟattu tirukkovalū[r*] eḻupattoṉpatunāṭṭup patiṉeṇpūmic cittira-

māyp potukaiyil innāyaṉāṟkku

eḻupa

[ṭa]yirāpatameṉa vayirākarattu vā[ra]ṇam vāri ceyirāppoṉ

veṟṟi[k]koṭi[y]oṭu vīramum oṅkak koṟṟa[k]kuṭaikkīḻ koṭaikkoṭi
yenti p[e]ṟṟakkoṉ tiruppu[ka]lūr teṉtiruvaṉaiya pukaḻni[ṟ]aipukaḻ puva[ṉa]-
mu[ḻu]tuṭaiyāḷoṭum

[va*]tāṉam uḷḷūra[k]kaḷ kalveṭṭi aṟavolai
ceytukuṭutta pa[ricā]vatu śrīvāmaṉaccerikku kīḻpārkkellai ūriniṉṟum
peṇṇaiāṟṟukkup poṉa vaḻikku meṟkum tenpārkkellai āḻvār vaṭak-
kiltirumatiḷukkum ūrnattattukkum vaṭakkum melpārkkellai nittavinotaṉ-
vāykkālukku kiḻakkum vaṭapārkkellai innittavinotaṉvāykkālukkut
teṟkum melvāyppulattu melālaṅkaḻanikku kīḻpārkkellai melaimāṭakkai-
veli melaivarampukku meṟkum ivvarampiṉ kottam teṟkil

ṉvāykkālukke yuṟa meṟ-
kum teṉpārkkellai ceti

tūmpiṉ kīḻālaittuṇṭamum iṉṉum muṭakkuttūmpukku meṟkum teṉ-
pārkkellai comācikīranūr ellaikku vaṭakkum melpārkkellai meṟpaṭiyār
ellaikku kiḻakkum iṉṉum tiruvīraṭṭāṉamuṭaiyār

ṇṭilukku vaṭakku nittavinotaṉvāykkālukke yuṟa nattag kuḻi aiññūṟum akappaṭa
kiḻakkum vaṭapārkkellai nittavinotaṉ[vā]ykkālukkut teṟkum kīḻpārkkellai
kaṇakkakkāṇi kuṭacceykku meṟkum vaṭapārkkellai meṟpaṭiyārkaḷ kāṇikkum
vayi

pokam nittavinotaṉvāykkālukke yuṟat teṟkum iṉṉum inṉitta-
vinotaṉvāykkālukku meṟkum iṉṉum iṉnittavinotaṉvāykkālukkut
teṟku māṭakkaiveli mutalmaṭaikke yuṟa itaṉukkut teṟkum uṭpaṭṭa nilat-
til

nvāykkālum muṭakkuttūmpiniṉṟum vaṭakkunokkippoṉa vāykkāluk-
kum nīkki nilamum kīḻkiṭaṅkukku kīḻpārkkellai kaṟṟukkāvukku meṟkkum teṉ-
pārkkellai erikaraikku vaṭakkum melpārkkellai nittavinotaṉvāykkālukku
kiḻakkum vaṭapārkkellai kumuḻiyiniṉṟum tiruccakkaravelikkup pāy

vāykkā-
lukkut teṟkum uṭpaṭṭa nilamum tiruccakkaravelikkuk kīḻpārkkellai [kaṭa]m-
paṅkālukku meṟkum teṉpārkkellai na

kkellai [pirappa]ñceykku kiḻakkum teṉpārkkellai ippirappañceykku
vaṭakkum melpārkkellai kaṟṟukkāvukku kiḻakkum vaṭapārkkellai vāykkālukkut
teṟkum iṉnum vaṭapārkkellai meṭṭukku teṟkum iṉṉum vāykkā-
ṉukkut teṟkku kaṭampankāliley uṟa teṟkku uṭppaṭṭa nilamum tiruccuṟṟu-
māḷikaiyil eḻu

ruḷi niṟkkum tukkai nilam eyila[ka]ttukku kīḻpārkkellai
meṭṭukku meṟkum teṉpārkkellai vāykkālukku vaṭak-

kum melpārkkellai kaṇṇikkālukku kiḻakkum vaṭapārkkellai vaṭakkil meṭṭukkut
teṟkkum uṭpaṭṭa nilamum puṟattaraikkālukku kīḻpārkkellai kollaikku meṟ-
kum teṉpārkkellai tiruvīraṭṭāṉa aḻivāykkālukku vaṭakkum melpārkkellai

nilam puṟat-
taraikkālukkut teṟkum uṭpaṭṭa nilam erippulattukku kīḻpārkkellai tiruvīraṭ-
ṭāṉamuṭaiyār

vatāṉattukkum akkāṭṭiyārmukkikku meṟkum teṉpārk-
kellai āccikaikkālukku va-

yār
eripulattukkut teṟkum meṟpaṭi nilattukku kiḻakkum vaṭapārkkellai kaṇṇikā-
lukkut teṟkum melai meṟpaṭi kkuṇṭilukku kīḻpārkkellai

yār erip-
pulattukku meṟkum teṉpārkkellai aricāṇimukkālukku vaṭakkum melpārk-
kellai meṟpaṭi nilattukku kiḻakkum vaṭapārkkellai kaṇṇikkālukkut teṟkum
uṭpaṭṭa nilamum peymeruṭṭikkuṇṭilukku kīḻpārkkellai maṇṭakacceri-
uṭaiyārkaḷ kolappāṭṭukku me-

ṟkum teṉpārkkellai āccikaikkālukku vaṭakkum melpārkkellai akkāṭṭi-
yārmukkikku kiḻakkum vaṭapārkkellai māḷikaiyuṭaiyārkaḷ kolappāṭṭukkut
teṟkum uṭpaṭṭa nilamum āṭṭucceṟuvukku kīḻpārkkellai erukkilaṅkaḻuvalukku
meṟkum teṉpārkkellai akampulattukku vaṭakkum me[l*]pārkkellai kaṇ-
ṇikkālukku kiḻakkum vaṭapārkkellai puḷiyañceykkut teṟkum uṭpaṭṭa nilamum
kaḷarmeṭṭukku kīḻpārkkellai tiruvīraṭṭāṉamuṭaiyār

laikku vaṭakkum melpārkkellai meṟpaṭiyār nilattukku kiḻakkum [vaṭa]pārkkellai
tiruvīraṭṭāṉamuṭaiyār

vatāṉattukkut teṟkum uṭpaṭṭa nilamum kaṟko-
lukku kīḻpārkkellai kalloṭukuṇṭilukku meṟkum tenpārkkellai kaṇṇikkā-
lukku vaṭakkum melpārkkellai āla

vaṉ tāmotiraṉ nilattukkut teṟkum uṭpaṭṭa nilamum cetirājaviḷā-
kattukku kīḻpārkkellai kallaṅkāṭṭu kkallukkum peṇṇaipperuñceykkum teṉ-
kālvaṭṭattukkum āṉakol kalloṭuceykkum meṟkum teṉpār-

tūmpiniṉṟum irumpāṭṭin vaṭavarukey poṉa vāykkālukku vaṭa-
kkum melpārkkellai ittūmpiniṉṟum vaṭakkunokki erikaraiyarukey mākāḷaṉ-
pulattukkup poṉa vāy[kkā]lukku kiḻakkum vaṭapārkkellai mākāḷaṉpulattukku-
ṇṭil[ni]lattukkut teṟku velañceykke yuṟat teṟkum ivvelañce[y*]kku
meṟkum ivvelañceykkut teṟkum ivvelañceykku kiḻakkum vaṭa[k]kil [uḷ-
nilattu]kkut teṟku kallaṅkāṭṭu kkallile yuṟat teṟkuḷḷa nilattu ceppukkā-
leṉṟu peruṭaiya vāykkāl nīkki nilamum

vaṉattukku kīḻpārkkellai ciṟupulattut
toṭṭattukku meṟkum na

talaivāykku meṟkum teṉpārkkellai meṟpaṭikālukku
vaṭakkum melpārkkellai kīḻvatittoṭṭattukku kiḻakkum vaṭapārkkellai
peṇṇaiāṟṟukkut teṟkum uṭpaṭṭa nilamum tiruvikkiramacerikku maṇṭaikeṇi-
kkum kīḻpārkkellai maturā

maṅkalattu ellaikku meṟkum teṉpārk-
kellai meṟpaṭiyār ellaikku vaṭakkum melpārkkellai āḻvār

maṅkalattu ellaikkum comācikīra-
ṉūr ellaikkut teṟkum uṭpaṭṭa nilamum paṉṟiyūrkku kīḻpārkkellai maṇṭai-
keṇikku meṟkum teṉpārkkellai [vi]raippaṭṭukkum kaṟaṭiellaikkum vaṭakkum
melpārkkellai iravikulamā[ṇi]kka

maṅkalattu ellaikku kiḻakkum vaṭa-
pārkkellai comācikīraṉūr ellaikkut teṟkum uṭpaṭṭa nilamum uyyakko-
ṇṭānviḷākattukku kīḻpārkkellai cittirakāraṉukku meṟkum teṉpārk-
kellai vicalūrkiḻavaṉvāykkālukku vaṭakkum mel-

maṅkalattu ellaikku kiḻakkum vaṭapārkkellai
ceppukālukkut teṟkum uṭpaṭṭa nilamum iṉnāṭṭu attaṉampon

māṉa ciñcilikaiveli-
kkum tirunārāyaṇavelikkum ayaṉneḻumāvukkum kīḻpārkkellai meṟpaṭi-
yūr ellaikku meṟkkum ayaṉneḻumāvukku vaṭapārkkellai vāykkālukkut teṟ-
kum kīḻpārkkellai ivvūr[pi]ṭāripaṭṭikku meṟkum teṉpārkkellai ciñci-
likai velipuḷikaime-

[ṭṭu]kke yuṟa vaṭakkum iṉṉum puḷikaimeṭṭukkottam merkkun[ok]ki meṟ-
paṭiyūr ellaikke yuṟa āṭṭāṉkālukku vaṭakkum melpārkkellai meṟpaṭiyūr
ellaikku kiḻakkum vaṭapārkkellai meṭṭuvāykkālukkut teṟkum uṭpaṭṭa nila-
mum jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu

vaḷanāṭṭup peṇṇaivaṭakarai
kkuḷappākkamāṉa karikālacoḻanallūrkku kīḻpārkkellai pūpe
maṅkalattu ellaikku meṟkum teṉpārkkellai maṟuvūre[ri]kkup pāy

edition.l:
kku vaṭakkum kulatīraca turvvēdi maṅkalattu ellai cāvānkaḻanikkum meṟpaṭiyār puṉcey
nilattukku vaṭakkum melpārkkellai attippākkattellaikku kiḻakkum veṭarkuḷat-

kuṟukkaikkūṟṟattu brahmadē yam tirukkovalūr tiruviṭaikaḻiāḻvārkku

l.ta:
ṭaiya mātā māṟi poṟ-
kāḷinaṅkaikkāka vaitta tirunu

viḷak konṟukku [v]aitta cāvā muvā perāṭu
toṇṇuṟṟāṟu ivvāṭu kaikkoṇṭu ivviḷakku

ruḷ kaucika aṇṇāvan tiruvikki[ra*]manukku viṟṟukku[ṭu*]tta nilamāvatu ivvūr
melvarappulattu kayaṟkāṇi taṭi iraṇṭināl karutteṭṭumāvilug kiḻakkaṭaiyak
kāl nikki meṟkaṭaiya munṟu māvum viṟpataṟkku kiḻpāṟkellai ikkayaṟkāṇi
kiḻakka-
ṭaiya niṅkug kāṟce[y*]kku meṟkum tenpāṟkellai ivvūr

nakkanā-
rāyaṇan uḷḷiṭṭāruṭaiya kuṉṟinkiḻk kāṟceykku vaṭakkum melpā[r*]kke-
[l*]lai tiruviṭaikaḻiāḻvār tiruvamutupuṟattuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai vai-

mum
kaiyyile poruḷaṟakkoṇṭu innilam iṟai iḻicci viṟṟu vilaiyā[va*]ṇam
ceytukuṭuttom

yom aṇṇāvan tirivikki[ra*]ma[ṉu]kku i[n*]nilam kayaṟkāṇiyil
muṉṟu māvum tiruviṭaikaḻi[ā]ḻvār[k*]kuk koṇṭu kuṭutteṉ aṇṇāvan
tiruvikkiramaneṉ iṉnilam kai[k*]koṇṭu ceyyum nima

māvatu ayppacit
tiruvoṇam tiruveṭṭai nāḷ tiruveṭṭ[ai]

tu ittiruvolakkattil amutuceyya a[ppa]amutukku arici
kuṟuṇi nānāḻiyum ney yirunāḻiyum veḷḷika[l]lāl nāṟpatin pa[la]c caṟkarai-
yum koṇṭu [nū]ṟu appaamutu camaittu ceyvippatākavum aṭaikkāyamutu
nū[ṟu*]m veṟṟilai āṟu paṟṟum ko-
ṇṭakam viṇṇappam ceyv[ā*]rkku oru kācu iṭu-

iṟai iḻicci iṉṉilattukku sa

aiyome iṟaiyiṟuppatāka viṟṟu vilaiyāva-
ṇam ceytukuṭuttom tiruviṭaikaḻi aḻvā[r*]kku sa

l.ta:
tuṭa[r*]vana-
velip paṭar vanavā[ci*]yuñ cuḷḷiccūḻmatiḷ koḷḷippākkaiyum naṇṇa[ṟ]karu-
muraṇ maṇṇaikkaṭakkamum porukaṭa liḻattaraiyartam muṭiyum āṅka[va]ṉ tevi-
ya(r) roṅkeḻil muṭiyum muṉṉavaṉpakkal te-

ra ṉāramum teṇṭirai iḻamaṇṭala muḻu[va]-
tum eṟipaṭaik keraḷaṉ muṟaimaiyiṟ cūṭum kulataṉamākiya palarpukaḻ muṭiyum
ceṅkatirmālaiyum caṅkatirvelai tolperu[g*](kā)kāval palapaḻa

maṟṟiva[ra*][ṇ] karuti [i*]ruttiya cem-
poṟ tiruttaku muṭiyum payaṅkoṭu paḻimika muyaṅkiyil mutukiṭṭoḷitta caya-
ciṅka[n] aḷapperumpuka(ḻ)ḻoṭu piṭir iraṭṭapāṭi eḻaraiilakkamum navane-
tikkulapperuma-

laikaḷum vikkirama[vira] cakkarakoṭṭamum mutir[pa]ṭaivalla matu[ṟa]maṇṭalamug
kāmiṭaivaḷar nāmaṇaikko[ṇa]mum veñcilaivirar pañcappaḷḷiyum pācuṭaip-
pa[ḻa]na mācuṇi

rattiṉai viṉaiyamaṟ kaḷattuk kiḷaiyoṭum piṭittu palataṉattoṭu niṟaikulataṉakku-
(ku)vaiyum kiṭṭaruñ ceṟimuḷai oṭṭaviṣayamum pūcurarcer [nal]kocalaināṭum
taṉmapālaṉai vemmuṉai yaḻittu vaṇṭuṟaicolai taṇṭaputtiyum iraṇacūraṉai
muraṇukat tākki tikkaṇakirtti [tak]kaṇal[ā]-

laṉai veñcamarviḷākat tañcuvittaruḷiyum oṇṭiṟal
yā[ṉai]yum peṇṭir paṇṭāramum nittilaneṭuṅkaṭa lutti[ra*]llāṭamum veṟi-
malarkirtti teṟipuṉaṟ[kag]kaiyum alaikaṭal naṭuvuḷ palakalam celutti cag[ki]-
rāmavicaiyottuṅkapa

kiṭārattaraiyaṉai vā[k*]aiyamporukaṭaṟ kumpakkariyoṭu makappaṭut turimaiyil piṟak
kiya perunetip piṟakkamum ārttavanakanaka[r*] porttoḻilvā[ca*]lil viccāti-
rat(t)tora[ṇamu]m mottoḷiṟp puṉaimaṇip puta[vamu]m kaṉamaṇik katavamum
niṟaicir vijaya[mum] tuṟainirp paṉṉaiyum [po*]ṉmalaiyūraiyil tonmalaiyūrum
āḻkaṭa[la*]kaḻcūḻ māyiruṭiṅkamum

kalaṅkāvalviṉai ilaṅkācopamug kāpperuniṟaipunal māppappa(v)āḷamum kāva-
lampuricai meviyapaṅkamum viḷaippa

edition.l:
porutaṇṭāṟk koṇṭa kopparakesa rivanma rāṉa uṭai yār śrīrājendra coḻa-
dē varkki yāṇṭu 24- āvatu || janaṉātavaḷanāṭṭuk kuṟukkaikūṟṟattu brahmadē-
yam tirukkovalū[rāṉa] śrīmaturānta kacaturvvē timaṅkalattu tiruviṭaikaḻiāḻ-
vārkku ivvūr sa[ bh ai] yom viṟṟukuṭutta nilamāvatu ivvūr melvāyp-
pulattuk kol[laini]lam taṭi mūṉṟināl karuttu-

nilam eḻumāvaraikkum kīḻpār[k*]kellai ittevar tevatānattukku meṟkkum
(kiḻpāṟkellai ittevar tevatāṉattukku meṟkkum) tenpāṟkellai
pe[ run tū] mpiṉinṟum kiḻakkun[o]kkippāynta vā[yk*]kā[lu]kku vaṭakkum mel-
pāṟkellai peruṅkaḷattukkup pāynta vāykkālukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai
peruṅka[ḷa]ttu[c]e[y*]kkum ittevatāṉattu-

l.ta:
perunāṉkellaikku uṭppaṭṭa nilam mikutikkuṟai
vuḷḷa[ṭa]ṅkak karuttunilam eḻumāvarai iṉṉilam eḻumāvaraiyum i[t*]teva-
ṟkku viṟṟukkuṭuttom sa
ccellak koṇṭu iṟaiyili viṟṟukkuṭuttom ti[ru*]kkovalū[r] sa

yom iṉṉilamum ittevarpaṇṭārattup poṉṉiṭṭukkoṇṭa pacu āṟum
kaikkoṇṭu ittevar ayppaci ttirunāḷ cevikkava
ṟkku oṉpatu nāḷum coṟiṭakkaṭavomākavum ittevar paṇṭārattil

tevakaṉmikaḷpakkal nāṅkaḷ koṇṭa poṉ patiṉkaḻañcukku viṭṭa nattamāvatu
ivvūr naṭuvilampalattukku vaṭakku ittevar tiruvācalukku kiḻakkiṭṭu vaṭakku
nokki āṟṟukku poṉa teruvu[k*]ku kiḻakkum itteruviṉiṉṟu ki-

ḻakkunokkip poṉa vaṭakkil teruvukku teṟkum meṟkiṭṭut teṉmaṭalāka oruc-
ciṟakaṉteruvukku kiḻ(m)

l kol oṉpatukku teṉmaṭal kol muppatteṭ-
ṭil vaṭakkucāra kiḻakkunokkip poṉa teruvukku irukol nikki

kol muppattaṟukolum naṭuviṟteruvu[k*]ku meṟkum naṭuvi nārācattukkum erik-
kum poṉa melaitteruvukkuk kiḻakkum teṟkil tirumatuḷukkun tiruvitikkun
teṟkum innāṉkellaikku muṭpaṭṭa nattamum ippeṇṇai āṟṟukkut tiru-
mañcaṇattukkup pom tiruviṭaikaḻi vati akalam kiḻ mel mukko-

edition.l:
lu miṉ[ṉu*] miv[v]āḻvār tirunanta vāṉam narasiṁ hapanma ṉukku kiḻpāṟkellai
ittiruviṭaikaḻivatikku meṟkum subrahmaṇya piḷḷaiyār muṭṭikuḻikku
teṟkkum tiruvikkiramaṉ a[ṇ*]ṇāvaṉ kollaikku kiḻakkum peṇṇai āṟṟuk-
kut teṟkum ināṉkellaikku muṭpaṭṭa puṉcai kuḻi 300- m

vāṉat-
tukku meṟkil maṅkalakkeṇiyum ivaittukku vilai

māka ivvāḻvār paṇ-
ṭā[rat*]tu tevakaṉmikaḷpakkal koṇṭa poṉ mukkaḻañcukkum ca

nta ṭiyaivaḻiyug kuṭamalaināṭug kollamug kaliṅkamum eṇṭicai puka-

l.ta: ḻtara īḻamaṇṭala muḻuvatum iraṭṭapāṭi eḻarai ilakkamu

ṇṭiṟal veṉṟit
taṇṭāṟ koṇṭu tanṉeḻil vaḷar ūḻiuḷ ellā yāṇṭu

ḻutakai viḷag-
kum yāṇṭe ceḻiyar[ai]t tecukoḷ śrīkovirājarājakecariva

aikkolāl irunūṟṟaimpattāṟu kuḻi
koṇṭatu orumāvāka vilaikoṇṭa nilam eḻumāvaraiyum koṇṭu vilai

rukko-
valūr tiruviṭaikaḻiāḻvārkku i[ṉ*]ṉilam eḻumāvaraiyum iṟaiyili vilaiko-

ṇṭu kuṭutta nilam ittevar tevatānam ciñciliveliyoṭug kiḻakkaṭaiya eḻumāva-
raiyug koṇṭu ellaikkal [na]ṭṭukkuṭutten aṇṇāvaṉ tiruvikkiramaneṉ in-
nilag koṇṭu i

mayanamum tirumañcaṇam kaḻañce eḻumañcāṭiyum (kaḻañce eḻumañ-
cāṭiyum) ponner iraṇṭu tirumañcaṇamuñ ce[y*]tu ippon[nil] tirumañ-
[ca*]ṇamtoṟum eṇṇāḻikkālālk kalakkala arici amutuceyvittu neyya-
mutu irunāḻiyug kaṟi[amutu] āṟum

tayira[mu]tu patakkum aṭaikkāyamutu nūṟum [veṟṟi]lai nālu paṟṟum puḷiṅkaṟi
amutukku puḷi aimpalamum caṟkkarai aimpalamum kaṭuku uḻakkum miḷaku āḻakkum
kalacam nūṟṟeṭṭum sna manadravya ṅkaḷ aṉaiccum kalacattiṉ kiḻaṭṭu nellu 1-
kalamum

manattukku veṇṭuvana
ellāg kuṟaivaṟuttu innilag koṇṭu ceyyakkaṭavo[m]

uri[m*]aiyil ciṟanta maṇimuṭi cūṭi villavar nilaikeṭa minavar [ku]laitara ē[n*]ai-
[ma]nnavar iriyaluṟ ṟiḻitara [tik]kaṉaittu [nta]-

ruḷi[na*] maṇavāḷāḻvāṉaiyum pirāṭṭiyaiyum jayag-
ko[ṇṭa] coḻamaṇṭalattu ūṟṟukkāṭṭu-

kkoṭṭattu ciyapuranāṭṭu aḷakūr vijaiyanalluḻāṉ ciriḷaṅkopperiyaveḷāṉ
viṇṇappañ ceytu amutuceytaruḷa nimanta ñ ceytapaṭi nāḷ 1- kkut tiruppo-
nakap paḻavarici patakku[kkune]llu ayṅkuṟuṇi-

l.ta:
yūm kaṟiyamutukku nānāḻiyum uppamutukku nāḻiyūm miḷakamutukku nānāḻiyūm
neyyamutu uḻakkāḻākku[kku*] kuṟiṇi nānāḻiyum tayiramutu irunāḻikku nānāḻi-
yum aṭaikkā[ya]mutu patiṉāṟukkum ilai[ya]mutu nāṟpatukkum nellu mu-
ṉnāḻiyum āka nāḷ oṉṟukku nellu irutūṇi muṉṉāḻiyum ulakaḷa

ṉmarak-
kā(l)lāl celvitākavum nāḷ oṉṟukkkuc ca

ṉakkāppu araikkaḻañcum iṉ-
nellum celkaikku ipperiyaveḷāṉ ceyvitta tiruna-
coḻanil kamukum teṅkum koṇṭu celvitāka nima
l.note: The inscription stops here.

cempo[ṉmatiṭ]tirukkovalūrkkellai tiṟalār ko matu[rā]ntakatevaṉ kaṇṭa-
paṭi ceppil ampoṉ viḷai

māmati ḷaṇṇāmalai vaṭa pālāṟu kiḻpāl umparpaṟai kaṇṇattampā[ṭi] kaṇ pa-

l.ta:
ruvūrkkūṟṟattu tirumutukuṉṟattu namperāl pāṇṭimaṇṭalattu cevvirukkai-
cempunāṭṭu nā[va]kuṟucciuṭaiyāṉ tirumāliruñcolai

rkaḷukku
taṅkaḷ akarappaṭṭarkaḷ per irupattunālukkup paṅku irupattunā-

muppatukku immaṇṭalattu innāṭṭu paruvūrpaṟṟil pakaṭaṅkuṭi nāṉkellaikku
uṭpaṭṭa naṉcey puṉceyum nattamum kuḷamum

kuḷapparappum kāṭu kaḷar tiṭar eri nirnilai maranilai āṟṟukkāl ūṟṟukkāl uḷḷi-
ṭṭa ivaiyiṟṟil kārpacāṉam navirai cittiraik kār kamuku koḻuṉ-

tu karumpu ceṉnel ceṅkaḻunir vāḻai iñci mañcaḷ uḷḷiṭṭaṉa tāṅkaḷ veṇ-
ṭum payir ceytukoḷḷavum ivaiyiṟṟāl varum neṟkaṭamai kā-

cukaṭamai māvaṭai puṉpayirkkaṭamai kaṭai[vari] ciṟṟāyam perāyam taṟiiṟai cek-
kiṟai taṭṭoli taṭṭārappāṭṭam pāci-

ppāṭṭam moṉampāṭṭam kāṇikkai kā[rttikaip]paccai eṭuttukaṭṭumpaccai
nittappaccai piḷḷaiyārnoṉpu āṇṭeḻu-

ttuttevai eṇṇaipaṉtam viṭṭuttevai matilttevai āṉaiccālai [ku]tirai-

inscription.head:
No. 184.
(A.R. No. 23-A of 1901).
ON A BROKEN SLABThe slab
relief the figures of the Sun and the Crescent, which are on either side of a liṅga. This is flanked by a seated
bull on one side and a lamp-stand on the other. The proper left portion of the slab is broken.LYING IN THE COMPOUND OF THE KANARA HIGH SCHOOL,
AT MANGALORE.

l.note: The line begins with a circle.

inscription.head:
No. 185.
(A.R. No. 23-B of 1901).
ON ANOTHER SLABAt the top, which is rounded, are engraved in relief sculptures of a liṅga on a pedestal with a prabhā
over it flanked by a cow and its calf on its proper right and a lamp-stand on the left, and of the Sun and
Crescent on either side of the liṅga. LYING IN THE SAME PLACE.

catuṣṭhayē [|*] pu[narabda]gatē cauvāṣṭaṣaṣṭyā samanvitē
[||7||*] gatēṣu navamāsēṣu kanyāyām samsthitē gurau [|*] paścimēhani
rōhiṇyām muhU[r]ttE śubhalakṣaṇē [||8||*]

lōkēśvarasya dēvasya pratiṣṭhāmakarō[tpra]bhuḥ [|*] śrīmatkadi[ri]kānāmni vihā-
rē sumanōharē [||9||*]ḥm svasti śrīḥ |

ON THE HILL AT THE SAME VILLAGE.

lu bālēṁduseṭṭige bhāge 1 bāṇasi pai[cha]seṭṭige bhāge 1 kājava cauḷiseṭṭige

nelli dēvaruseṭṭige bhāge 1 naṁda birumaṇaseṭṭige bhāge 1 ·olepāḍiya dēvaruseṭṭige bhāge 1

inscription.head:
No. 392.
(A.R. No. 182 of 1901).
ON THE NORTH, WEST AND SOUTH WALLS OF THE SAUNDARARAJA-PERUMAL TEMPLE AT
SOMANGALAM, CONJEEVERAM TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. The first two lines and part of the third have been published in the South-Indian Inscriptions,
Volume III, Part II, page 139f.

(A.R. No. 262-A of 1901).

OF THE SAME TEMPLE.

yeḻarai yilakkamu[m*]
l.i: To the left of the right side post.

l.ta:
navanetik kulapperumalaikaḷum vik-
kiramavirac cakkarakoṭṭamum mu-
tirpaṭavallai matu
l.note:
This inscription commences on the top of the right side post from lines 1 to 32 and is then continued on
the left side post from bottom upwards up to line 62. Line 63 is incised letter by letter to the right of the
second post from top to bottom; and line 64 is engraved to the left of the first post from bottom upwards letter
by letter. The inscription is, however, incomplete.

inscription.head:
No. 485.
(A.R. No. 269 of 1901).
ON THE WEST WALL OF THE SECOND PRAKARA OF THE TYAGARAJASVAMIN TEMPLE AT
TIRUVARUR, NEGAPATAM TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT.

edition.l:
svasti śrī [||*] pūmaṉṉu patumam pūtta veḻulakun tāmuṉ cey tavattāl parutivaḻit
toṉṟi neṭumā livaneṉac cuṭarmuṭi [cūṭi*] irunilamakaḷai urimaiyiṟ puṇarntu
tirumakaḷ paṇaimulaic ceñcān taḷaintu parumaṇi mārvam paṉivarai nikaṟpa jayamakaḷ
ceḻu[ñca*]ntaṉac cuvaṭṭāl pu[ya] mirukayilaip poruppeṉat tonṟi nāmakaḷ
tāṉum eṅkomakaḷ cevvāyp pavaḷacceyoḷip paṭaittaṉa niyāneṉat tavaḷa-
naṉṉiṟan taṉittoṭai••• [pukaḻma]kaḷ•• ḻunāḷilum
oruku[ṭai nila]vum porupaṭait tikiri veyilug karuṅkali iruḷiṉait turappa
niṭu pal[lū]ḻi eḻkaṭaṟpuṟattiṉug koṭāc centaṉi-

l.ta:
kko liṉitulāva mīṉamuñ cilaiyuñ citaittu vāṉuyarp poṉṉeṭu meruvil puli
viṟṟiru[p]pa umpariyāṉai oreṭṭiṉukkun tampameṉṉat taṉittaṉi ticaito-
ṟum vicaiya

mpam niṟppa pacipakaiyāṉatu titu nīṅka maṉṉuyir taḻaippa
maṉu[vāṟu viḷa]ṅka mātavar tavamu maṅkaiyar kaṟpum ātiantaṇa [rā] kutik kaṉalu
miteḻu koṇṭal vī[cu] taṇpuṉalu metiṉil vaḷaṉuñ cāti oḻukkamum nīti
aṟamum piṟaḻātu nikaḻap pā••••• [ḷai]kkaimāvu mallatu
vaṉṟaḷaippaṭutal kaṉavilug kāṇṭaṟ ka[rit]eṉa varuntip puṭaiyiṉum pa[lv]eṟu
puḷḷiṉu mallatu ciṟaiyeṉappaṭuta liṉṟi ni-

ṟaiperuñ celvamo ṭavaṉivāḻap pallavar teluṅkar māḷuvar kaliṅkar kocalar
kaṉṉaṭar kaṭārar teṉṉar ceralar ciṅkaṇar ko[g]kaṇar cetikar tirikattar vaṅka
raṅkar vattavar mattirar kaṅkar coṉakar kaikaiyar jiṉareṉ ṟaṟaikaḻal[venta]rum
al[lā]va[rai]carum muṟaimaiyil varinta tiṟai kuṇarn tiṟaiñca ampoṉmalaṟ
koṭic cempiyaṉkiḻānaṭi [oru]marug kuṭaṉamarn tiruppa aruḷpuri cimai[ya]ppoṟ-
[ko]ṭṭi[m]ai[yappāvaiyuñ] civa[nu]mpolap puvaṉamuḻutuṭaiyā[ḷa]van tiru-
maṇimārvat taruḷ muḻutu[ṭ]aiyāḷeṉa uṭaṉiruppac cempoṉ vīra

edition.l:

śrīrāj[ēntra] coḻatevarkku yāṇṭu munṟāvatu puliyūrkoṭṭattuc curattunāṭ-
ṭuc coḻativākaraccaruppetimaṅkalattu tiruccuramuṭaiyār civabrāhma ṇan gō ta-
man udayadi vākarapaṭṭanāna kaliyāṇacunta rapaṭṭanum ūra[ṉ]bha ṭṭanāna tekkiṇā-
mūttipaṭṭanum uḷḷiṭṭa civabrāhma ṇarom cempūrkkoṭṭattu cempūrnāṭṭu
kalikuḷattuvāyuṭaiyān koyil maṇṇaikoṇṭacoḻapa[l*]lavarayanpakkal nāg-
kaḷ koṇṭa nel nūṟṟaimpatin kalattināl āṇṭuvarai kalattukku mukkuṟuṇiyāka

ney uḻakku[m] komuttiramug komayamum koṇṭu apiṣekam paṇṇuvittu
tirumañcaṇañ ceyvittu ttiruvārātanaiyum paṇṇuvikkakaṭavomākavum tiruva-
mutu nānāḻi ariciyug kaṟiyamutu iraṇṭum neyya[mu]tu nta yiramutum aṭaikkāya-
mutug koṇṭu amutuceyvikkaka[ṭav]omākavum nittappaṭiyum manti rapuṣpam
cārttuvikka kaṭavomākavum ippaṭi canti rāti[t]tavarai muṭṭāmal celuttakkaṭa-

edition.h4:
Transcript. The transcript and translation of this inscription were furnished by Mr. Ghulam Yazdani M.A.,
Epigraphist to the Government of India for Persian and Arabic inscriptions.

arab.i: Ki bād Z6illi abad bar mafāriqi anām
Zi bas murawwaji dīn sāḵh6t ḵh6ānā'i Islām
Nida'i sa7lī tawāriḵh6i ān ba-goṣh6 rasīd

translation.p:
1 During the period of the sovereignty of 'Alī 'Ādil S6h6āh (II), may the shadow
(of his protection) last for ever over the heads of people!

2 During the administration of 'Abd'ul H2usain, the exalted, the foundation of the
lofty mosque • • • named after the Sult6ān

3 Was laid, and the monastery and the cells for (the accommodation of) the pious
(were built): (the builder) made enough provisions for the propagation of the
‘faith’ from the ‘house of god.’

4 This voice reached the ear regarding the date of the building: Turn thy face
towards the Holy Mosque.’

NOTE.—The last hemistich is a quotation from the Qur'ān (Chap. II), and according to
the Abjad system gives the date 1477 A.H. (1669 A.D.) The literary style of the verses is
very poor and they contain mistakes of idiom and grammar.

inscription.p:
Published in the Archaeological Series of the Hyderabad State, No. 8, pp. 8 ff.
In the readings given there, the following corrections have to be made:—
Line 20.—For “= enesele” read “ene sale” and remove footnote 1.
Line 22.—For “kain = idi” read “kai-nīḍi” and remove footnote 2.
Line 25.—For “= itt = anuta (ch)chhatram =” read “= itta nutachchhatram =”
For “nān = oḷiyal = uṭṭade” read “nāṇ = aḷiyal = uṭṭuda”
For “= ir [dd = eḷ = a]ṇna” read “= irddoḍ = aṇna”
Line 52.—For “= ikkida nīraja-vanaṁ” read “= ikkidan = irad = avanaṁ”
Line 77.—For “saṁvarip = aṁ [t = u] rvv = ene” read “saṁvaripaṁt = orvvane”
84.—For “r = āḻd = aḍaṁgaḷa page [k = a] = ryyan” read “r = ēḻd = aḍaṁgada page kayyan”
Line 113.—For “ādud = ent = ene” read “ādud = ind = ene”
Line 121.—For “biṭṭan = id = ēḷki-pēṟare” read “biṭṭ = irid = aḷki band = eṟage”

Line 122. = For “lōk-aika—pāḷaṁ dugundaleyaṁ je••-” read “lokakke peṁpiṁd =
ugundale yeṁbant-ire maime-”
Line For “Māḷavaṁ sa-” read “Māḷavaṁ gaḍ = a-”
Line 125.—For “kaḷa- nṛipad = irppam =” read “rkkada nṛipar = uḷkadirppa”
Line For “= al = irppa••••• ṟ = ad = irppa” read “male•• ṟadirppa”

Line 126.—For “= adēṁ piridiṁ bāhu -baḷann—aḷidante” read “= idēṁ pirido bāhu-balan =
nuḍidante-”
Line 127.—For “jesa.t = ārtthi = jana” read “•• sakaḷ-ārtthi = janaṁ”
Line 128.—For “tmakam = āndu kaṇḍun = itt = ara•• d” read “saraṇ = endu kaṇḍu nittarisid”
Line 136.—For “Vineyol = eseda vara” read “eḷeyoḷ baḍavara kai”
For “ºd = eṁ[te] pesakam = illade” read “ºdu dānam = esakam = ellara”
For “taḷad = aḷad = aṁt = ā” read “taḷedaṁ gaḍ = adeṁto”
For “= ellin = oppuḍam =” read “elli nōḻpaḍam-ī” and remove footnote 2
Line 141.—For “= adan =” read “adēn =” and for “-[bhadraṁ]” read “bhēda-”
Line 170.—For “-viśāla-” read “-viśāḷa-” and for “ºmumaṁ akhiḷa-” read “ºmuman = akhiḷa-”
Line 188.—For “= entud = eṁbaṁ” read “= eṁtuṭ = eṁbaṁ”
Line 210.—For “Māleya” read “[Sā]leya” as in l. 176, and for “Būva” read “Bōva”

Line 5.—For “—pramukhaṁ” read “prāmukhaṁ.”

l.note:
A portion of the inscription between this and the next face has not been copied. As the third
here must actually be the fourth face, the lines have been numbered afresh.

kāṭṭuṅkoḷ eṉṟu keṭṭaiṭattu ikkāṇi eṉṟu collukaṟa pirāmaṇar
āṇṭutoṟum tirunāmattukkāṇi peci nilakkūlikkum vitaimutalukkum etiraṭai
olaikāṭṭiṉapaṭiyālum kopperuñciṅkar nāḷilum

nilakkūli taṇṭip pontapaṭikkuk koyil parimāṟṟag kāṭṭiṉapaṭiyālum perumāḷ
vikkiramapāṇṭiyatevar ittiruppātirippuliyūr uṭalaṭaṅka iṟaiyiliyāka aiñ-
cāvatu nāḷil eḻutiṉa tirumukattile tirunāmattukkāṇi paṭat tirumukam eḻutit
tiruveḻuttuc cāttiṉa ittirumukaṅkoṇṭu tiruvītivalamāka ippirāmaṇaruṭa-
ṉuṅkūṭa alaṅkarittuk kallum veṭṭi iṉṉāḷvaraiyum aṉupavittuppontu
irukka ippoḻutu collakkaṭavatalla eṉṟu muta[li]kaḷu[m*] aruḷacceytu
nāṅkaḷum colliviṭṭatu itu tirunāmattukkāṇi eṉṉumpaṭi keṭṭu aṟṟu
viṭṭapaṭikku ittirukkoyilile kalluveṭṭikkoḷvatu ippaṭikku ivai

yaṉ eḻuttu ippaṭikku ivai tiṭṭaicceri cuntarapāṇṭiyap

vaḷanāṭṭup paṭṭāṉpākkanā-

l.ta:
ṭṭu coḻakulavallinallūr pullāliveḷāṉ kaṟpakapperumāṉ tiruvaṇṇāmalaip-

nilavilai

māṉa tuṅkap pallavaraiyaṟkku eṅkaḷ

ttil nāṅkaḷ viṟṟukkuṭutta nilamā-
vatu pullālikkaṭṭaḷaiyil cuttavallivatikkuk kiḻakku rā
l.note: The symbol for rāja is employed before je

l.ta:
teṟkku mutaṟkaṇṇāṟṟu iraṇṭāñ catirattum muṉṟāñ catirattum avaṉiāḷap-

yāṭṭattukku meṟkkum ivvapimāṉatuṅkappallavarai

yar tiruvayintirapurattu tiruvācaṭiyil [u]kantaruḷap paṇṇiṉa civarākanāyaṉār tiru-
viṭaiyāṭṭattukkum nāyaṉār teyvanāyakaṉukku[m*] puttuḻār villavarāyarum
āmuruṭaiyār tāyāṇṭārāṉa kaḷappāḷarāyarum koṇṭu viṭṭa tiruviṭai-
yāṭṭattukku vaṭakku-

m innāṉkellaikku uṭpaṭṭa kollainilattu ivapimāṉatuṅkappallavaraiyar
nāyaṉār civarākanāyaṉārkku koṇṭu viṭṭa tiruviṭaiyāṭṭam turavaṭikkollai
nilam araimāvum tuṟkaitiruviruppu uṭpaṭa nilam kāṇi muntirikaiyum nikki
nikki nilam

muntirikaiyum viṟṟukkuṭuttuk koḷvatāṉa emmilicainta vilaipporuḷ aṉṟāṭu
naṟkācu

ikkācu eḻunūṟum āvaṇakkaḷiye kāṭṭeṟṟik kaiccela vaṟak-
koṇṭu viṟṟu vilaippiramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭuttom meyūr milaiyaṅkiḻāṉ
maṉṟilkuṉikkumperumāṉā-

ṉa apimāṉatuṅkap pallavaraiyarkku pullāliveḷāṉ kaṟpakaperumāṉ tiruvaṇṇā-
malaipperumāṉ uḷḷuṭṭārum araiyaṉ utaiyapperumāṉāṉa cempiyarum
veḷāṉ paṭṭāltevaṉāṉa muventaraiyar uḷḷuṭṭārum i[v*]vaṉaivom
ippaṭikku ivai

pullāliveḷāṉ tiruvaṇṇāmalaipperumāṉ eḻuttu ippaṭikku ivai utaiyap-
perumāṉāṉa cempiyata[r*]aiyaṉ eḻuttu ippaṭikku ivai veḷāṉ paṭṭāla-
tevaṉāṉa muventaraiyaṉ eḻuttu innilam nālumā [mu]ntirikaiyum tiruvayin-
tirapurattu tiruvācaṭiyil nāṉ uka-

ntaruḷapaṇṇiṉa civarākanāyaṉārkku ciṟukālaicantikku iraṇṭu viḷakkum ucciccan-
tikku iraṇṭu viḷakkum irākkālattukku eṭṭut tiruviḷakkum ākat tiruviḷakku
paṉṉiraṇṭum cantikku pattu nāḻikai e[ri]kkavum m[āta]m oṉṟukku nālumuṟai
eṇṇaikkāppu

cāttavum innilam nālumā muntirikaiyum ikkoyiṟ kāṇiuṭaiya k[ā](ṇ)ṇi-
yāḷar••• ippuñcai nilam aṉaittuvaṟkkamu[m*] uḷpaṭṭa tām
veṇṭum koḻuntu uḷḷiṭṭa puṉpayiruḷḷa vāṉpa[yi]r ceytukoṇṭu it-
tiruviḷakkup paṉṉiraṇṭum cāttu

eṇṇaikkāppum muṉṟāvatu mācimātamutal kaiykkoṇṭu cantirā[ti][t*]tavarai-
yum celvatāka innilam viṭṭamaikku meyūr milaiyaṅkiḻāṉ maṉṟiṟku[ṉi]kkum-
perumāṉāṉa apimāṉatuṅkap pallavaraiyaṉ eḻuttu [||*]

yāṟe kāli lantag kaḷaintu niṅkiya nilattā ṉiṅkā neṟṟukai āṅkorum[āvi]ṟ
kaṟukalamākak koḻunūṟ ṟavarāṭug kūṭti yaḷanta eḻunūṟ ṟirupati liṟaimakaṟ kuri-
mai nāḻiyeṭṭāṉvāḻi yaṭṭāṉak karuṅkāloṉṟāṟ ceṅkaiyiraṇṭiṭṭaḷanta
nellāṟṟupataṉiṟ kaḷainta nivantat taṉmai niṉaiyi luvantu nañcuṇṭavaruk kamu-
tuṇa nayantavot[t]eṇ vaḻuvāp patteṇ kuttal paḻanel larici paṉṉiru
nāḻikku patiṉaiyiraṭṭi neṟ patiṉaiyiraṭṭiyug kuṟuvāḷāṉa neṭuvā ṇayaṉik
korirunāḻi yuḷppaṭut tuyarnta nel nāleṭṭāṉa nāḻiyum me-

•••••• miḷaku muppiṭikku cellak kuṭutta nel laññāḻiyuñ
cūḻ kaṟi tuvaṉṟa poḻkaṟkoḷ n[eṟ pe]rukkiya nāluri yurikkiya [na]ṟune yuḻak-
karai taṉakku vaḻakkarai viṉavil munnāḻiyun tayir munnāḻik kāṅkaṟunāṉāḻiyu ma-
ṭaikkāyamitiṟkup panniruḻakkum paricāraka māṇaṉ ṉāṉkiṉukku nel laṟunāṉāḻiyun
tirumaṭaippaḷḷip perumaṭaik kutavu mintaṉa voruvaṟkut tanta muṉṉāḻiyum āka
neṟ kalamu meka naṟṟivacam appari ciyaṟṟali laṟuvakai[yi]rutuvu mippari ciyaṟṟi
yeḻuntu nerāṉapiṉ putumalar virintu matumalar colaip puḷḷur kova luḷḷurp
paḻanilam iraṭṭu mukkāliṟ ṟanta patiṉaiñcu moṭṭuk kallaikkavar muṉṟu māvum
ālañceṟuvi lañcumāvum tiraṇṭu pāypuṉaṟ ṟeṅkācceṟuvi liraṇṭumāvum
iluppaikkā liraṇṭum nellālit teḻum pullālip puṟa mañcoṭug kūṭṭi ākiya
nilattokai apputtiraṇṭiyalmā muppattiraṇṭu melā ṟuṇarnta nālā ṟeṇ-
payi lantaṇa raṉaivarkku mariccaṉāpokan tantapiṉṉait taṭamalarp poykaip pota-
kar paḻaṉap putumalarc colaic citāri pala mañcu mañcāmaṟ keṭṭa tiruvaiyyaṉ
koṭṭamil kuṇattāṟ cempoṟ puricaic civapurattāṟkuk kova lantaṇarpāṟ
koṇṭu koṭuttaṉa paṇṭaik kolāṟ paṇṭaik kuḻittokai maṇaṅkoṇ
ṭiṇṭu muṇaṅkalpūṇṭi yopputtoṟu mā muppat[ta*]ṟumāvu mikavantuyarpuṉaṟ
pakavantakkaḻaṉi yeṭṭumuta lirupatumāvu maṭṭaviḻ pūttuḻāviya puṉal māttuḻāṉ-
veli ēviya veṭṭumāvum vāviyiṟ koṭeṟu paḻaṉak kāṭeṟu mānila mañcug
kaḷarnilam pattun neñcattuḷḷattakum puṉalu[ravu]kkaṭa lukāyampaḷat tiraṇṭu[m]
pāvarug ka[ṇi]yakkaḻaṉiyi leṭṭug kaikalan turaippiṟ ṟuḻaṉi-

•••••• kala[me]ṉa meṟpaṭi kālāṟ pāṟpaṭa vaḷanta viṅkuṭa-
ṉavar [p]āṅkuṭaṉ ṟokutta [me]ññūṟṟu[raikai]yil metaku tūne laññūṟ-
ṟirupat tirukalam[eṉa] maṟṟait tokaiyil mativaḷar caṭaiyoṉ peṟṟa vāram
piḻaiyaṟap pecilaimpatiṟṟaiñcoṭu moympuṟu patiṉoru kalattoṭu muṇaṅkal-
pūṇṭiyiṟ kaṟaiñ[e]l naṉcai ñikkip puṉcai nāṉamā māttāṟ kalavaraiyāṉa
varaiyaṟai aṟukala meṟṟip peṟukalavaḷavai muṉṟoṭu muppatu kuṟainta muṉ-
ṉūṟṟuk kalattiṉil maṟṟak kaṇṇutaṟkāka nilattava ruvanta nivantan nalattaku nā-
ḷoṉṟiṉukku nāṉmuṉṉāḻi pāṉiṟat taṉmait tūniṟak kutta lariciyilāṉa nellu
varicaiyiṟ kuṟupavaḷ kūli yeṟṟip peṟuvaṉa peṇiya paḻaneṟ ṟūṇiyug
kāṇiyavai yamitu pukaḻu neyyamutu muppiṭi koḷḷak koṭutta nellaṟunāḻiyum
poḻutu muṉṟiṉukkiḻutupaṭu centayi roru muṉṉāḻik kirumuṉṉāḻiyu maṭaikkāya

kañ ceyyat tantaṉa kuṟuṇi muṟṟa-
tainta nāṉāḻiyu maṟaiyaval cey māṇiraṇṭiṉukku kuṟaivaṟak kuṭutta neṟ kuṟu-
ṇi ñāṉāḻiyu morāṇṭiṉukku nerāṇṭāka naṇṇiya nakṣattirameṉa nallo
[ṉa]ṇṇiya tiruviḷak keṇpatug kaṇṇeṉak kāviyar kayalpaya lāviyūrataṉiṟ ṟik-
kuṭai yivaru mukkuṭaiyavartam aṟappuṟamāṉa tiṟappaṭa nikkic cāli viḷaiñilam
veliyākki mutalvatiṉ muṉṟe mukkā leyaraikkā lita[ṉ] taṉivanta miyalvakai
yuraippil oppat tiruvaṉaiyavar muppattiruvar pāṭal payiṉṟa nāṭakamakaḷiṟkum
neñcācāra niṟaivoṭu kuṟaiyāp pañcācāriyap pakutiyoṟkum naṟaipputumalar-
viri nantavāṉa miṟaipputtoḻil purinta viruntavattoṟkum yokiyoruvaṉu-
kku niyokamuṭai nila-

cu]ṭaik kaṭikaiyaṉ ṟaṉakkum neñcil vititta muṟaimai matittu nokki yiṉṉavai
piṟavu mi

ṭikku ivai caṅkaranārāyaṇapaṭṭaṉ eḻuttu ippaṭi aṟiveṉ iḻakkantiṟattu

aṟive-

iḷaiya tirunaḷḷāṟuuṭaiyāṉpaṭṭaṉeṉ

edition.l:
hara || svasti śrī || tiripu[va*]ṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīirājarājadē vaṟku yāṇṭu [10]-
vatu etirāmāṇṭu uṭaiyār tiruvāticuramuṭaiyār tevatā[ṉaṅkaḷu]m iṟai-
yilikaḷum kal veṭṭiṉapaṭi ||—periyadē var irājādhirā[jadē] vaṟku 11- vatu aḷanta
grāmasādhana ppaṭi utaiyaca[n*]tiravāykkālukku teṟku melaitteruvil kiḻ
ciṟakil tirunantavaṉam nilam nālumā mukkāṇi araikkāṇiyum i[ta]nkiḻ••
••••

l.ta: maṉṟukku teṟku naṭuvil teruvukku kiḻakku irāyūr jātave

paṭṭaṉ kuṇṭur nārā-
yaṇapaṭṭaṉ vaṅkipuṟattu eṭuttapātapaṭṭaṉ vaṅkipuṟattu cempiyaṉ

mārā-
yar uḷiṭṭārpakkal koṇṭa [nū]ṟṟirupattiruvaṉ nantava[ṉa]m kuḻi muṉṉūṟ
ṟirupattu oṉṟarai || yum
l.note: The punctuation || should follow yum instead of preceding it.
l.ta:
kiḻaitteruvukku kiḻakku kaṭalāṭuperuvaḻikku teṟku
tirumukai tirunantavaṉam uḷpaṭa va[ṅ]kipuṟa•••••

tiruñāṉacampantaviḷākam kuḻi nāṉūṟṟu irupattunālum ||| iṅke vaṅkipuṟattu
tevata[t*]tapaṭṭaṉpakkal koṇṭa tirukkuṟipputtoṇṭaviḷākam kuḻi nūṟ-
ṟeḻupat toṉpate kā[lu]m ||| itaṉ kiḻakku tirutteḷicceri ellaiyuṟa vaṅkip-
puṟattu tiruñānacampantar kuṇṭur iḷayakarumāṇikkapaṭṭaṉ kalikaṭintāṉpaṭṭaṉ
tūrppil nittavinota

kālukku vaṭakku melaipperuvaḻikku meṟku neṭuṅkuḷattukku teṟku vaṅkipuṟattu
ī

rapaṭṭa[ṉ] uḷḷiṭṭārpakkal koṇṭa tiruñāṉacampantar tirunantavaṉam
kuḻi āirattorunūṟṟu nāṟpattu muṉṟarai itil niyokappaṭi puṉcey oṭṭu-
kku iṟukkum kalluvāy kuḻi nūṟṟaimpatu ||| kiḻaipperuvaḻikku kiḻakku utaya-
cantiravāy[k]kāl•••••

tāṭipaṭṭaṉpakkal vilaikoṇṭa•• ccomp[ā]tā[ṉ]tirunantavaṉam kuḻi
aiññūṟṟeḻupatum ||| oṭṭil kaḻitta iṟaiyili nilam mukkāle orumā[vu*]kku
paṟṟu muṉṟāṅkaṭṭaḷai ālālacuntaraviḷākam kuḻi aiññūṟṟu nāṟpatteḻum
eḻāg kaṭṭaḷai nālāg kaṇṭam vikkaviṉāyakaviḷākam kuḻi aiññūṟṟu muppatti-
raṇṭe iraṇṭumā[vu*]m eṭ[ṭā]g kaṭ The inscription is built in at the right end.••••••

nāyaṟṟu pūrvapa[k*]ṣattu pañcamiyum putaṉkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa

No. 1048.
(A.R. No. 415 of 1902).
IN THE SAME PLACE.

edition.l:
svasti śrī [||*] tiṅkaḷertaru nta ṉṟoṅkal veṇkuṭaikkiḻ nilamakaḷ nilava malarmakaḷ
puṇarn tu ceṅko loccik karuṅkali ka[ṭi]n tu tanta yar tamai yaṉ ṟampiyar taṉ
ṟiru[m*]ainta ṉeṉ ṟivarai maṇimuṭi cūṭṭik kaṉṉikāvalar teṉṉavar muvaril
vāṉaka miruvaruk karuḷi kāṉaka moruvaṉuk kaḷittu-

l.ta:
ḷurccālai kalamaṟuppit tilaṅkaiyaṟ karai-
caiyu malaṅkal vallavaṉaiyug kanṉakucciyar kāvalaṉaiyum poṉṉaṇi muṭittalai
taṭintu taṉ koṭippaṭai yevik kaṉṉāṭakar viṭu kaṭakari puraḷat taṉṉā[ṭ*]aiyiṟ
ṟamiḻp paraṇikoṇ ṭe(ṭ)āṉṉār [va]cciraneṭuvāḷ

viccayaṉ veruneḷit tañci yoṭat taṉ vañciya[m] paṭaiyā lāṅkavaṉ pitāvai mā-
[tāv]oṭuñ catāmaliviṅku nīrppūṇṭur veñcamat takappaṭuttayappaṭai [y]āka-
vamallaṉ payattoṭu varaviṭu moṟṟarai veruvarap piṭit tāṅkavar mārvi[l]ākava-
